original: Thanks to "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" quick thinking, her salvo only managed to displace some dust.
(Miss)
Her claws connect with "+e.getCombatName()+"!
Thanks to "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" superior reflexes, her claws leave "+e.getCombatName()+" unmolested.
Fortunately, "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" sealed armor prevents the arousing pheromones from reaching "+e.getCombatName()
but the force of the impact knocks "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" to the ground regardless. "+H.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+(e.isPlural||e.isPlayer()?"are":"is")+" tripped!
The powerful strike
almost knocks "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+"down whilst
sends "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" to the ground whilst
potent pheromones drown "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" nostrils with sultry aromas.
"+H.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+(e.isPlural||e.isPlayer()?"are":"is")+" tripped!

Her whip connects with "+e.getCombatName()+", constricting "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" body in a draining embrace. “Resistance is futile, [pc.name]”\n\n"+H.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+(e.isPlural||e.isPlayer()?" are ":" is ")+"grappled!
, unable to find any more energy to leech from "+H.m.possessive(e.getCombatName())+" shield, drains "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" lifeforce instead.
The powerful impact against the geddanium hunk leaves "+e.getCombatName()+" staggered.
“Fall to your death! Worthless insect!”
At the last moment, "+e.getCombatName()+" jump"+(e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"":"s")+" out of her reach. Her claws close firmly over unlucky molecules of oxygen and nitrogen.
The powerful lunge staggers Strict-9!
Paulette surely made progress with the Steele Tech Disabled Support Project. You should check on her at the Steele Tech Research Facility.
Paulette
The cyborg places her left hand over her Annihilator cannon as the light surging from it reaches a blinding intensity. You must stop her now before it’s too late.

Taking hold of "+e.getCombatName()+", the flying amazon roughly drags "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" across and over the ragged granite wall. After a dozen painful seconds, she sends "+e.getCombatName()+" flying at a stray armor plate.
“Get off [pc.himHer] you goon!” Paulette screams.
Paulette fires her Pyrexxx Annihilator at [target.CombatName]!
Paulette charges forward, claws sparkling with electricity!
“Eat this!” Paulette groans, spinning her hardlight-tipped tail!

Your crewmate flips a hidden switch in her chest. A cloud of glowing green nanomachines engulfs you! In the blink of an eye, the tiny machines stitch your wounds close and clear your mind from Strict-9’s poisons!\n\n\t\t“Round two, bitch!”
Paulette opens her wings and soars through the air! She closes her fist, making it crackle with ball lightning as she channels unstable plasma inside her very palm!
“Time to finish this!” Paulette says, charging her arm cannon with destructive power!
Dreadful light sparks through Paulette’s Pyrexxx Annihilator! She’s preparing a big load!
“Disappear!” Paulettte shouts before unleashing all she’s got into one devastating shot! Strict-9 screams as a ball of pure plasma engulfs her!
She is no longer tripped!
Some of her glowing bullets manage to connect with "+e.getCombatName()+".
"+H.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+" evade"+(e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"":"s")+" her tail’s powerful hit.
Despite "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" best efforts, the strong tail hits "+e.getCombatName()+" right on the head.
"+textify(s||(s=(0,T.Z)(["The former XO hits Strict-9 square in the chest. The sheer force of the blow knocks her back, releasing you from her crushing grasp!"])))
"+textify(r||(r=(0,T.Z)(["Strict-9 tightens her grip on you. She nimbly dodges Paulette’s attack, crushing you with her powerful thighs as she leaps out of reach!"])))
"+textify(h||(h=(0,T.Z)(["Strict-9 evades the energy blast!"])))
"+textify(g||(g=(0,T.Z)(["Her daring strike goes wide!"])))
"+textify(y||(y=(0,T.Z)(["Paulette’s sharp, glowing tail-cap hits Strict-9 square in the chest!"])))
"+textify(m||(m=(0,T.Z)(["Strict-9 effortlessly deflects the attack with her own tail!"])))

"+textify(w||(w=(0,T.Z)(["The former XO strikes Strict-9’s belly with earth-rending force! The zaika mercenary screams in pain as Paulette lifts her off the ground and throws her across the room!\n\nStrict-9 slowly stands back up, holding her fuming middle with a hand. “You dirty tailsucker! I’ll make you pay for this!”"],["The former XO strikes Strict-9’s belly with earth-rending force! The zaika mercenary screams in pain as Paulette lifts her off the ground and throws her across the room!\\n\\nStrict-9 slowly stands back up, holding her fuming middle with a hand. “You dirty tailsucker! I’ll make you pay for this!”"])))
"+textify(k||(k=(0,T.Z)(["“You’re too slow!” Strict-9 barks, swirling out of reach!"])))
"+textify(l||(l=(0,T.Z)(["The "," hits her square in the chest!"])),t[o][1])
"+textify(d||(d=(0,T.Z)(["Her charged hit squeezes a pained groan out of ","!"])),e.getCombatName())
continues to leech "+H.m.possessive(e.getCombatName())+" shield’s energy away.
